items.name: sqlserver-offset-fetch
items.sql: SELECT [id] FROM [dbo].[users] ORDER BY [id] OFFSET 10 ROWS FETCH NEXT 5 ROWS ONLY

expect.deparse_contains: OFFSET 10 ROWS FETCH NEXT 5 ROWS ONLY

items.name: sqlserver-cte
items.sql: WITH active_users AS (SELECT [id], [name] FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE [status] = 'active') SELECT [id], [name] FROM active_users

items.name: sqlserver-left-join
items.sql: SELECT [u].[id], [p].[phone] FROM [dbo].[users] AS [u] LEFT JOIN [dbo].[phones] AS [p] ON [u].[id] = [p].[user_id]

items.name: sqlserver-unicode-string
items.sql: SELECT N'Bob''s order' AS label FROM [dbo].[orders] WHERE [customer_name] = N'Alice'

items.name: sqlserver-functions
items.sql: SELECT ISNULL([name], 'unknown') AS [name], GETDATE() AS [now_value], NEWID() AS [row_id] FROM [dbo].[users]

items.name: sqlserver-row-number
items.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [status] ORDER BY [id]) AS rn, [id] FROM [dbo].[users]

items.name: sqlserver-case-expression
items.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN [status] = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS active_flag FROM [dbo].[users]

items.name: sqlserver-union-all
items.sql: SELECT [id] FROM [dbo].[users] UNION ALL SELECT [id] FROM [dbo].[archive_users]

items.name: sqlserver-create-table-identity
items.sql: CREATE TABLE [dbo].[users] ([id] INT IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY, [name] NVARCHAR(64), [active] BIT)

items.name: sqlserver-transaction
items.sql: BEGIN TRANSACTION; UPDATE [dbo].[users] SET [status] = 'active' WHERE [id] = @id; COMMIT TRANSACTION

items.name: sqlserver-grant-revoke
items.sql: GRANT SELECT ON [dbo].[users] TO [app_role]; REVOKE SELECT ON [dbo].[users] FROM [app_role]

items.name: sqlserver-numeric-types
items.sql: CREATE TABLE [dbo].[payments] ([id] BIGINT IDENTITY, [amount] DECIMAL(18,2), [created_at] DATETIME2)

items.name: sqlserver-cast-date
items.sql: SELECT CAST('2024-01-01' AS DATE) AS created_date FROM [dbo].[users]

items.name: sqlserver-quoted-identifier
items.sql: SELECT [Order Detail].[Order ID] FROM [dbo].[Order Detail] WHERE [Order Detail].[Order ID] = @order_id

items.name: sqlserver-merge-basic
items.sql: MERGE INTO [dbo].[users] AS [t] USING [dbo].[staging_users] AS [s] ON [t].[id] = [s].[id] WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET [name] = [s].[name] WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT ([id], [name]) VALUES ([s].[id], [s].[name]);

items.name: sqlserver-cte-top-main-select
items.sql: WITH latest_users AS (SELECT [id] FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE [status] = 'active') SELECT TOP (3) [id] FROM latest_users ORDER BY [id]

items.name: sqlserver-unicode-duplicate-literal
items.sql: SELECT 'same' AS ascii_value, N'same' AS unicode_value FROM [dbo].[users]

items.name: sqlserver-top-with-ties-unsupported
items.sql: SELECT TOP (10) WITH TIES [id] FROM [dbo].[users] ORDER BY [score]

items.name: sqlserver-pivot-unsupported
items.sql: SELECT * FROM [dbo].[sales] PIVOT (SUM([amount]) FOR [month] IN ([Jan], [Feb])) AS [p]

items.name: sqlserver-sp-prepare
items.sql: EXEC sp_prepare @handle OUTPUT, N'@p1 int', N'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=@p1'

expect.deparse_contains: EXEC sp_prepare @handle OUTPUT, N'@p1 int', N'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=@p1'

items.name: sqlserver-sp-prepexec
items.sql: EXEC sp_prepexec @handle OUTPUT, N'@p1 int', N'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=@p1', 42

expect.deparse_contains: EXEC sp_prepexec @handle OUTPUT, N'@p1 int', N'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=@p1', 42

items.name: sqlserver-sp-executesql
items.sql: EXEC sp_executesql N'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=@p1', N'@p1 int', @p1=42

expect.deparse_contains: EXEC sp_executesql N'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=@p1', N'@p1 int', @p1=42

items.name: sqlserver-top-named-param-like
items.sql: SELECT TOP (@limit) [id] FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE [name] LIKE @pattern ORDER BY [id]

items.name: sqlserver-sp-prepare-insert
items.sql: EXEC sp_prepare @handle OUTPUT, N'@id int, @name nvarchar(50)', N'INSERT INTO users(id, name) VALUES(@id, @name)'

expect.deparse_contains: EXEC sp_prepare @handle OUTPUT, N'@id int, @name nvarchar(50)', N'INSERT INTO users(id, name) VALUES(@id, @name)'

items.name: sqlserver-sp-executesql-update
items.sql: EXEC sp_executesql N'UPDATE users SET name=@name WHERE id=@id', N'@name nvarchar(50), @id int', @name=N'bob', @id=1

expect.deparse_contains: EXEC sp_executesql N'UPDATE users SET name=@name WHERE id=@id', N'@name nvarchar(50), @id int', @name=N'bob', @id=1

items.name: sqlserver-view-top-direct-and-bind
items.sql: SELECT TOP (@limit) [id], [name] FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE [id] = @id ORDER BY [id]

items.name: sqlserver-view-case-expression
items.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN [state] = 1 THEN [name] ELSE [fallback_name] END FROM [dbo].[users]

items.name: sqlserver-view-group-having-order
items.sql: SELECT [dept], COUNT([id]) FROM [dbo].[users] GROUP BY [dept] HAVING COUNT([id]) > 1 ORDER BY [dept]

items.name: sqlserver-select-not-between-named-params
items.sql: SELECT [id] FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE [age] NOT BETWEEN @min_age AND @max_age

items.name: sqlserver-update-exists-subquery
items.sql: UPDATE [dbo].[users] SET [status] = @status WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [dbo].[orders] o WHERE o.[user_id] = [users].[id] AND o.[phone] = @phone)

items.name: sqlserver-select-derived-table-filter
items.sql: SELECT t.[id], t.[phone] FROM (SELECT [id], [phone] FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE [status] = @status) t WHERE t.[phone] = @phone

items.name: sqlserver-offset-fetch-named-params
items.sql: SELECT [id] FROM [dbo].[users] ORDER BY [id] OFFSET @offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @limit ROWS ONLY

items.name: sqlserver-select-left-join-alias-star
items.sql: SELECT u.*, o.[order_no] FROM [dbo].[users] u LEFT JOIN [dbo].[orders] o ON u.[id] = o.[user_id] WHERE o.[status] = @status

items.name: sqlserver-create-view-join-aggregate
items.sql: CREATE VIEW [dbo].[v_user_orders] AS SELECT u.[id], COUNT(o.[id]) AS [order_count] FROM [dbo].[users] u JOIN [dbo].[orders] o ON u.[id] = o.[user_id] GROUP BY u.[id]

items.name: sqlserver-top-question-bind-order
items.sql: SELECT TOP (?) [id] FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE [name] LIKE ? ORDER BY [id]

items.name: sqlserver-multi-statement-global-bind-position
items.sql: UPDATE [dbo].[users] SET [a] = ? WHERE [b] = ?; UPDATE [dbo].[users] SET [c] = ? WHERE [d] = ?

items.name: sqlserver-select-derived-query-graph
items.sql: SELECT s.[name] AS [outer_name] FROM (SELECT [id], [name] FROM [dbo].[users] WHERE [age] <= @age) s WHERE s.[name] LIKE @name

items.name: sqlserver-merge-bind-query-graph
items.sql: MERGE INTO target t USING source s ON t.id=s.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET phone = ? WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, phone) VALUES (?, ?)

items.name: sqlserver-merge-by-source-unsupported
items.sql: MERGE INTO [dbo].[users] AS [t] USING [dbo].[staging_users] AS [s] ON [t].[id] = [s].[id] WHEN NOT MATCHED BY SOURCE THEN DELETE;

items.name: sqlserver-top-offset-fetch-unsupported
items.sql: SELECT TOP (10) [id] FROM [dbo].[users] ORDER BY [id] OFFSET 20 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY

items.name: sqlserver-hook-parse-transact-sql
items.sql: SELECT PARSE('42' AS INT USING 'en-US') AS [v] FROM [dbo].[users]

items.name: sqlserver-hook-try-cast-transact-sql
items.sql: SELECT TRY_CAST('42' AS INT) AS [v] FROM [dbo].[users]

items.name: sqlserver-hook-try-parse-transact-sql
items.sql: SELECT TRY_PARSE('42' AS INT USING 'en-US') AS [v] FROM [dbo].[users]
